title: Fernwood is a fork of PicoClaw
rationale: Forked from sipeed/picoclaw, renamed all references from picoclaw to fernwood. Module path is github.com/strand1/fernwood. Binary is fernwood, cmd dir is cmd/fernwood.

content: Test device is ARM64 Linux. Build for deployment with: make build-linux-arm64. Copy binary to test device manually after build.
Workspace is ~/.fernwood/workspace on the test device. Config is ~/.fernwood/config.json. Mulch data lives in ~/.fernwood/workspace/.mulch/

title: Mulch integration for persistent agent memory
rationale: Integrated jayminwest/mulch for domain-based expertise storage. Agent uses mulch_query tool to retrieve domain knowledge on demand. Domain summaries injected at startup as compact index. mulch_record tool for agent to proactively record learnings.

description: XML tags in system prompt caused LLM to imitate XML format for tool calls, leaking raw XML syntax into Discord messages.
resolution: Replace XML-formatted skill summaries in BuildSkillsSummary() with plain-text code blocks using neutral fence like ```skills. System prompt should never contain angle-bracket XML tags as LLMs will imitate surrounding syntax.
